Platelet distribution width [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet [Entitic mean volume] in Blood by Automated count

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All hematological parameters are within normal limits except for a markedly elevated platelet distribution width (PDW), which may indicate increased platelet size variability, possibly due to platelet activation or turnover. No evidence of anemia, leukocytosis, or thrombocytopenia. Correlate with clinical context; if no symptoms or relevant history, this isolated PDW elevation is often non-specific. No acute hematological abnormality detected.
Leukocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
